title: Simply Stone
description: Replaces several stone variants with regular stone.
body:
# Simply Stone

Drastically simplifies what blocks spawn underground, in the name of simplifying gameplay.

Completely removes Deepslate, Tuff, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, and Dripstone Blocks from world generation, replacing them with standard Stone.

- Dripstone Clusters are preserved structurally but generate using Stone.
- Glow Lichen are completely removed.
